design_philosophy: Authoritative, technical, and precise. A command-center for cybersecurity data science utilizing the 'Control Room' grid.

rules: BANNED: Inter, Space Grotesk, Roboto, Open Sans.
Overlines/Labels must be uppercase, text-xs, tracking-[0.2em].
Data figures and axes must use JetBrains Mono for tabular lining.
CRITICAL: Teal (#1B93A4) and Purple (#9D4CDD) are STRICTLY BANNED.
Do not use pure black (#000000) or pure gray. Use the provided tinted obsidian (#0A0A0A).
Hover states must be explicitly defined with higher contrast.

layout_and_spacing.container_padding: p-6 or p-8 for rich spacing, even in dense dashboards.
rules: Grid children must stretch vertically (h-full) to prevent jagged bottoms.
Mobile-first: grid-cols-1 scaling to grid-cols-4 or grid-cols-12 for bento.
Cards must be flat with 1px border. NO heavy shadows, NO glassmorphism.

components.cards: Flat background (#1A1A1A), 1px solid border (border-white/10), slight lift (-translate-y-1) on hover.
components.buttons: Square or 2px radius. Primary uses Volt Blue (#007AFF) with pure white text.
components.charts: Recharts. Line charts for ARIMA, Bar for Poisson. Grid lines should be border-white/5.
components.tables: Technical Grid Borders style. Visible skeletal grid (border-collapse, border-white/10).
components.forms: Shadcn UI customized. Square corners, flat surfaces, explicit focus rings (ring-2 ring-[#007AFF]).

rules: Staggered entrance for dashboard widgets (Framer Motion).
Micro-interactions on hover (slight translate-y, border color shift).
No long, slow animations. Keep it snappy and functional.

hero_background.description: Futuristic data analytics interface in low light.
hero_background.usage: Use with bg-black/70 overlay behind the main hero text and key stats.

abstract_texture.usage: Use as a subtle masked background for the 'Download PDF Report' CTA section.

pages.hero_landing: High impact layout. Bold 'Outfit' H1 heading. Display key metrics (12-year data, <5% MAE) in bento-style stats cards.
pages.eda_dashboard: Dense multi-chart view. Breaches by year, industry, type. Mix of Bar, Pie, and Line charts.
pages.arima_forecasting: Focus on Time-Series. Large central chart comparing historical (white/gray line) to predicted (Volt Blue line). Confidence interval area shaded.
pages.poisson_modeling: Focus on distribution. Bar chart showing actual vs expected counts. Use Amber for visual distinction.
pages.interactive_prediction: Two-column layout. Left: Control sliders/selects. Right: Massive JetBrains Mono typography for predicted outcomes.
pages.dataset_explorer: Data-heavy table view. Sticky headers, technical borders, inline filter inputs.
pages.model_metrics: Minimalist 'Tracing Beam' style cards for MAE, RMSE, AIC metrics. High precision typography.

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute. Convention: kebab-case, role-based.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react recharts framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge lucide-react
Implement pure HTML/Tailwind for the marketing hero section, use Shadcn for the dashboard components.
Strictly follow the color palette. Any use of teal or purple will result in rejection.
Ensure charting components (Recharts) are responsive and match the dark theme.
Apply data-testid to every button, input, tab, and major chart container.
Remember you only have .js and .jsx files. Setup everything accordingly without Typescript files.
